subject: Math

lesson.story_mission: Help the Trail Rangers figure out how many supplies remain after deliveries.
lesson.mini_lesson: Subtract two-digit numbers by place value. Line up tens and ones, subtract ones first, and regroup 1 ten as 10 ones when there are not enough ones.
lesson.objective: Subtract two-digit numbers within 100 using drawings, number lines, and place value.
lesson.concept_explanation: Two-digit subtraction compares ones with ones and tens with tens. When the top number has too few ones, decompose 1 ten into 10 ones.
lesson.common_misconception: A child may subtract the smaller digit from the larger digit instead of regrouping.
lesson.real_world_connection: Subtracting within 100 helps track leftovers, distances, and scores.
lesson.lesson_summary: Subtract ones, regroup if needed, subtract tens, and check the difference.
hints: Line up tens with tens and ones with ones.
Subtract the ones first. Regroup 1 ten as 10 ones if needed.
Then subtract the tens and write the difference.

worked_examples.text: 70 - 30 = 40 because 7 tens minus 3 tens leaves 4 tens.
58 - 24 = 34 because 8 ones - 4 ones = 4 ones and 5 tens - 2 tens = 3 tens.
52 - 28 = 24 because regroup 5 tens 2 ones as 4 tens 12 ones.

hint_ladder: Line up tens with tens and ones with ones.
Subtract the ones first. Regroup 1 ten as 10 ones if needed.
Then subtract the tens and write the difference.

misconception_bank.regrouping_confusion: Learner may forget to trade 1 ten for 10 ones.
misconception_bank.subtracts_smaller_from_larger_digit: Learner may subtract the smaller digit from the larger digit regardless of order.
misconception_bank.tens_ones_alignment_error: Learner may subtract tens from ones or ones from tens.
misconception_bank.count_back_error: Learner may count back too many or too few spaces.

game_theme.title: Subtract Within 100

story.text: Listen to this page. You are starting a math mission about Subtract Within 100. Look at the story and think about what the characters need to solve. Math missions are easier when you name the numbers and the model first. Press Start Mission when you are ready.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This lesson teaches Subtract Within 100. Look at the subtraction model and connect each part to the math words. Use the vocabulary on the page to explain your thinking. Remember to check place value, units, or symbols before you answer. Press Next to continue.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: This page lets you watch a worked example for Subtract Within 100. Follow the model one step at a time. Say what each number means before you look at the final answer. If a symbol appears, read it in words like plus, minus, equals, greater than, or less than. Press Next to continue.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This demo helps you try Subtract Within 100 with support. Build or study the model first, then connect it to the question. A good strategy is to explain the answer in math words before choosing. Press Next when you are ready for practice.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: This is practice. Use the visual model to help you think about Subtract Within 100. Press Read Question if you want the exact question read aloud. Check your strategy before you choose or write an answer. When you are ready, answer the question and keep going.
practice.label: Read This Page

badge.text: This badge page celebrates your mission work on Subtract Within 100. Look at your stars and remember the strategy you used. Mistakes help show what to practice next. Save your growth data to continue.
